title: [LinkModules] Add support to link hw modules
body:
Objective: Ensure that the HW modules preserve the hierarchical structure after linking.  This is required to generate metadata from the final mlir, because only the om classes are not enough. The mlir modules that are linked are generated after export verilog, and the output linked mlir will not be used for verilog generation.

This implementation extends the om-linker to link HW modules instead of dropping them.
This ensures that all symbol declarations and references are updated on conflict after linking.
The linker can only rename private modules in case of conflicts. Any other conflict in module name results in failure to link.
